title: marketing-angles — Input Schema
description: Input for Skill 08: marketing-angles. Final skill of Phase 1.5. Requires outputs from Skills 06 and 07.

validated_niche.description: The validated niche string from Phase 1 positioning output.

price_point.description: Impulse price point for the offer. Determines NESB Big validation standard.

dominant_emotion.description: The single dominant emotion driving the target audience's buying decision.

dominant_persona.description: Primary buyer persona used to fill all angle hooks and scripts.

psychographic.description: One-sentence psychographic summary. e.g. 'Overwhelmed side-hustler who tried 3 courses and gave up.'

top_3_uvp.description: Exactly 3 unique value propositions from Phase 1 positioning.

competitor_names.description: List of direct competitors to audit in Step 6 Competitive Gap.

market_awareness_level.description: Current awareness level of the cold audience. Determines which angle archetypes are deployed first. HALT if missing → [BLOCKING ERROR: marketing-angles — market_awareness_level required]

visual_identity_ref.description: File path to 06-visual-identity.json output. e.g. 'phase-1-5/outputs/06-visual-identity.json'. Used for brand colour and style alignment in creative hooks.

brand_voice_ref.description: File path to 07-brand-voice.json output. e.g. 'phase-1-5/outputs/07-brand-voice.json'. HALT if file not found at this path → [BLOCKING ERROR: marketing-angles — 07-brand-voice.json required]

competitor_dominant_angle.description: One-sentence description of the angle pattern that ALL competitors in the niche are using. e.g. 'All competitors lead with income screenshots and hustle-culture positioning.'

new_mechanism_name.description: Proprietary mechanism name established in Phase 1 positioning. e.g. 'The 3-Day Profit Protocol'. HALT if missing → [BLOCKING ERROR: marketing-angles — new_mechanism_name required from Phase 1]

halt_conditions.condition: file not found at provided path

halt_conditions.error: [BLOCKING ERROR: marketing-angles — new_mechanism_name required from Phase 1]
